50 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
Navamsa longitude ofL agna will conjunct with Nakshatra of
Natal Moon or its trine Nakshatras". This is supported by
tradition, as well as many textual quotes. Nava-Navamsa
longitude is known by many other names such as Navamsa
Navamsa longitude, Kunda longitude etc as well.
What is the reason for this insistence that NavaNavamsa
longitude should conjunct with Nakshatra of Natal Moon?
Lagna signify body; and Moon signify mind. For an intense
activity like birth to take place both body and mind should be
in tune. This is why, the astrologer insists that, Nava-navamsa
longitude of Lagna and the longitude of Natal Moon (or its
trines) should conjunct, for the birth to take place. In essence,
rise of Air tatva and resonating co-operation of body and mind
is essential for any birth to take place.
Use of Kunda multiplication method for BT rectification
